title: Health endpoint returns status ok
description: Verifies the health endpoint returns a 200 response with JSON containing status, version, and uptime.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/v1/health
Verify the response status code is 200
Verify the response body is valid JSON containing status equal to 'ok', version as string, and uptime as number

title: Analyze small npm package is-odd
description: Verifies analyzing a small npm package returns key metrics including gzipSize, installSize, typeBreakdown, dependencies, and module format flags.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/v1/package/is-odd
Verify the response status code is 200

Verify the response body is valid JSON containing source equal to 'npm', packageName equal to 'is-odd', packageVersion as string, gzipSize as positive number, installSize as positive number, fileCount as positive number, typeBreakdown as non-empty object, dependencies as array, dependencyCount as number, hasESM as boolean, hasCJS as boolean, hasTypes as boolean, downloadTime as object with keys '4g' 'wifi' 'gbit', and cachedAt as string

title: Analyze npm package with specific version
description: Verifies requesting a specific version via query param returns analysis JSON for that version.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/v1/package/ms?version=2.1.3
Verify the response status code is 200
Verify the response body contains packageName equal to 'ms' and packageVersion equal to '2.1.3'

title: Nonexistent package returns 404 error
description: Verifies requesting a nonexistent npm package returns a 404 with JSON error.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/v1/package/this-package-does-not-exist-xyz-999
Verify the response status code is 404
Verify the response body is valid JSON with error and message fields

title: Compare two npm packages with query params
description: Verifies comparing two npm packages returns both analyses and a computed diff.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/v1/compare?a=is-odd&b=is-even
Verify the response status code is 200

Verify the response body is valid JSON containing 'a' object with packageName and gzipSize, 'b' object with packageName and gzipSize, and 'diff' object with gzipSize, installSize, dependencyCount, and smaller

title: Compare endpoint rejects missing params
description: Verifies missing required comparison parameters returns 400 with error.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/v1/compare
Verify the response status code is 400
Verify the response body is valid JSON describing an error

title: Default badge returns SVG
description: Verifies requesting a badge without type parameter returns a valid SVG image.

steps.description: Navigate to /badge/ms
Verify the response Content-Type header contains 'image/svg+xml'
Verify the response body contains '<svg' indicating a valid SVG document

title: Gzip badge returns SVG with gzip label
description: Verifies requesting a gzip badge returns SVG with gzip size label.

steps.description: Navigate to /badge/ms?type=gzip
Verify the response Content-Type header contains 'image/svg+xml'
Verify the response body contains '<svg' and 'gzip'

title: Install badge returns SVG with install label
description: Verifies requesting an install badge returns SVG with install size label.

steps.description: Navigate to /badge/ms?type=install
Verify the response Content-Type header contains 'image/svg+xml'
Verify the response body contains '<svg' and 'install'

title: API root lists available endpoints
description: Verifies the API root returns a list of available endpoints.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/v1/
Verify the response status code is 200
Verify the response body is valid JSON containing version as string, baseUrl as string, and endpoints as non-empty array
